body:
She cuddles up with me on the couch. The two of us wrapped up in a blanket, savoring the places where we touch, especially skin against skin.

But also so exiting is we’re binging one of my favorite shows. And I love the fact that I get to re-experience it as new, through her eyes. Additionally, I get to show her a piece of who I am, through the stories that I love. But this is still more than that, through these shared stories we create our own shared mythology, our own shared language with which to relate to each other with.

Contented, yet filled with a soft shared intimacy, we touch, we laugh, and we get wrapped up in the story…until she kisses me.

Maybe we’ll rewatch this episode…
